meaning: n.行动,进行,[pl.] 会议录,学报
examples: Wait till I talk to Max before proceeding.
On the way home from Vietnam, I found out that Chuck Ruff, my White House counsel during the impeachment proceeding, had died suddenly.
Ford's director of sales analysis, George Pipas, acknowledged the concern, but said Ford is proceeding cautiously.
Tanzania is proceeding with plans to build a road through its Serengeti National Park.
